description: Versioned metadata for the interactive report prompt used by Layer 4 skills.

changelog.summary: Initial registry metadata for existing prompt artifact.

compatibility.migration_notes: Initial prompt registry entry. Prompt text changes require changelog updates before enforcement becomes blocking.

governance.review_requirement: Prompt owner review plus Contract Council review for input/output or risk-class changes.
governance.approval_threshold: One Layer 4 reviewer and one Platform Contracts reviewer.
governance.rollout_policy: Prompt-policy compatibility changes start in warning mode and graduate behind feature flags.
governance.deprecation_policy: Retain previous prompt metadata until all workflows reference the new version.
